intro: Lepisorus palmatopedatus, also known as Palmate Spikenard, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and improve overall immune function.
